name.title: Name your workspace
name.description: Workspaces keep your agents organized, one for personal, one for work, etc.

provider.title: Connect your AI
provider.description: Houston uses <emph>your own</emph> subscription. We never see your credentials.

errors.setupFailed: We couldn't finish setting up your workspace. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Houston
welcome.tagline: Houston is where you build agents that work with the same apps you already use.
welcome.stepsTitle: A quick setup to get your agent working:

steps.brain: Connect an AI provider so it can think
steps.email: Send your first real email with it

defaults.focus: Help me stay organized, prepare my day, draft messages, protect focus time, and keep track of follow-ups.
defaults.approvalRule: Ask before sending messages, creating calendar events, or changing anything in connected apps.
defaults.firstWorkflow: Set up my first useful daily workflow

intro.title: Let's set up your account
intro.body: A few quick steps and your agent is ready to work for you.

brain.title: Log in to your AI subscription
brain.body: Choose the AI you already pay for. You bring your own subscription, so Houston never sees your password or your bill.

providerLogin.title: Log in to {{provider}}
providerLogin.body: Sign in once so your agent can use {{provider}} on your behalf.

connected.title: You're all set
connected.body: We found {{provider}} on this computer. You're signed in with your own subscription, so there's nothing to set up here.

tools.title: Connect your apps
tools.body: Your agent works with apps like Gmail and your calendar through Composio, a secure integration provider. One account lets it connect any app, only when you actually need it.
tools.waiting: Waiting for you in your browser...

connected.title: You're all set
connected.body: Your agent can now connect to your apps whenever you need them.

meet.title: Create your first agent
meet.body: Give your agent a name and a color. You can change them anytime.

aiConnected.title: Your AI is connected!
aiConnected.body: Your agent can think now. You're one step closer.

appsConnected.title: Apps connected!
appsConnected.body: Setup done, nice work. Now let's create your first agent.

connectEmail.title: Give your agent access to your email
connectEmail.body: Pick your email so your agent can send on your behalf. You connect it once, securely.

agentCreated.title: Agent created!
agentCreated.body: Meet your new agent. Two quick steps and it's working for you.

emailConnected.title: Email connected!
emailConnected.body: That's how easy connecting an app is, and your agent can reach 1000+ this way.

emailIntro.title: See your agent in action
emailIntro.body: Your agent will send a real email to you, so you can watch it work.

emailSent.title: Email sent!
emailSent.body: Go check your inbox, your agent just sent you a real email.

finished.title: You're all set!
finished.body: Your agent is ready. What would you like to do next?
finished.tourBody: A quick walkthrough of the basics.
finished.connectMoreBody: Give your agent access to more of your tools.

onboardingIntro.title: Now let's put it to work
onboardingIntro.body: Three quick steps to see your agent do something real.
